update

net/xapsd: patch to work around invalid http headers

- add patch to work around invalid http headers, taken from https://github.com/freswa/dovecot-xaps-daemon/pull/36
- switch back to latest go and remove deprecation notice
- update to 1e589be / g20240326 - minor documentation changes only https://github.com/freswa/dovecot-xaps-daemon/compare/836a75b..1e589be
- tell portscout to ignore as we are using the master branch
